name: discord-random-defense
description: Discord-linked single-player random defense fan game monorepo.

scripts.refactor:lobby: pnpm run refactor:lobby-topbar && pnpm run refactor:lobby-shop && pnpm run refactor:lobby-upgrade && pnpm run refactor:lobby-economy && pnpm run refactor:lobby-upgrade-cost && pnpm run refactor:lobby-hero && pnpm run refactor:lobby-artifact
scripts.prebuild:web:legacy: node scripts/refactor-pixi-combat-runtime.mjs && node scripts/fix-floating-text-lifetime.mjs && node scripts/add-unit-info-panel.mjs
scripts.build:web: node scripts/fix-mythic-ingredient-type.mjs && pnpm run refactor:lobby && pnpm --filter @discord-random-defense/web build
